The problem with vibe coding.
There are essentially three core issues with vibe coding.
So let's break them down.
First up, you've got brain overload, also known as context rot.
This happens when you basically give the LLM way too much information and it just gets
lost in the weeds.
Your context window has completely full.
The second one is planning instability.
This is when the model decides, you know what?
I'm going to change the plan right in the middle of a task.

You know the one where you, every single time you restart a chat session, everything is
